heroSummary: A premium astrology experience built to answer your most important questions with clarity, timing, and real guidance.
Discover how your chart influences your next year, your relationships, and the choices that matter most.

overviewIntro.title: Full clarity across every major life area.
overviewIntro.text: This service is created to help you see the true meaning behind your chart, understand the timing of key moments, and make confident decisions for what comes next.

experienceSection.title: A smooth, professional process from first call to final guidance.
experienceSection.text: We keep the experience calm and useful: exact astrology data, clear explanation, and a plan you can follow.

processSteps.title: Step 1 — Share the essentials
processSteps.text: Provide your birth date, time and location so the analysis can be built on exact chart data.

processSteps.title: Step 2 — Explore the themes
processSteps.text: Review the astrology guidance for your career, relationships, health, and the timing ahead.

processSteps.title: Step 3 — Receive a clear plan
processSteps.text: Get practical suggestions, meaningful timings, and the next actions that feel aligned with your life path.

detailsHeading.title: In-depth explanations for every category we analyze.

title: Kundli Analysis
description: A detailed Vedic kundli analysis covering education, career, business, marriage, doshas, wealth, health, housing, fortune, planetary positions, and foreign travel prospects.

highlights.description: overall education potential, suitable fields of study, competitive exams, higher education, career alignment

highlights.description: love marriage vs. arranged marriage tendencies, spouse characteristics, compatibility, delays, career after marriage, family dynamics

highlights.title: Yog & Dosh
highlights.description: Jobs, money, health, house, rising of fortune, planets position, foreign travel
